name: oh-my-codex
description: Multi-agent orchestration layer for OpenAI Codex CLI

interface.shortDescription: Workflow layer and skill bundle for OpenAI Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Plugin = OMX skill/workflow discovery plus plugin-scoped companion metadata for MCP servers and apps. Setup = runtime wiring; legacy setup installs native agents/prompts, while plugin setup archives stale legacy native agents/prompts and keeps config, native .codex/hooks.json coverage, optional AGENTS.md, HUD, and runtime state current.
